ANNEX TO THE GLOBAL MASTER REPURCHASE AGREEMENT
(GMRA 2011)

Dated: September 1, 2023
Seller: Pinnacle Fixed Income Ltd (LEI: 549300NF0HQLTPIQH841)
Buyer:  StoneRidge Capital Partners LLC

1. Initial Margin
   The Initial Margin Ratio shall be 102% of the Purchase Price
   (i.e., a margin add-on of 2%).

   The Margin Maintenance Level shall be 101% of the current Market Value
   of the Purchased Securities.

2. Net Margin
   Net Margin shall apply: margin exposures across all outstanding Transactions
   shall be aggregated before any margin call is issued.

3. Eligible Purchased Securities
   The following securities are eligible for sale under Transactions
   pursuant to this Agreement:

   (a) UK Gilts — all maturities — Haircut 1.0%
   (b) German Bunds — maturities up to 30 years — Haircut 0.5%
   (c) US Treasury Notes and Bonds — all maturities — Haircut 0.5%

   Concentration Limits: No single sovereign issuer shall exceed 60% of the
   aggregate Market Value of Purchased Securities outstanding at any time.

4. Repricing
   Repricing shall occur daily on each Business Day.
   The non-defaulting party must give not less than 2 business hours' notice
   prior to requesting repricing.

5. Substitution
   Substitution of Purchased Securities is permitted.
   The Seller shall give not less than 3 Business Days' written notice
   prior to effecting any substitution.

6. Income and Manufactured Payments
   All income in respect of Purchased Securities shall be payable by the
   Buyer to the Seller as a Manufactured Payment on the Business Day on
   which such income is paid by the relevant issuer.

7. Tri-party Settlement
   All Transactions shall be settled through Euroclear Bank SA/NV acting
   as Tri-party Agent.

8. Default Interest
   Overdue amounts shall bear interest at SONIA + 200 basis points per annum.

9. Set-off
   Upon the occurrence of an Event of Default, the non-defaulting party shall
   have the right to set off all amounts payable under this Agreement.

Governing law: English law.
